name: knowz
description: Frictionless knowledge management via the Knowz MCP server for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Query, capture, and regroup context across Knowz vaults
interface.longDescription: Bring Knowz knowledge management into Codex with vault-aware skills that query, save, regroup current session context into resumable handoffs, and configure shared Codex Knowz access.
defaultPrompt: Search our Knowz vaults for prior art on this feature
Save this implementation decision to the right Knowz vault
Regroup this session into Knowz and give me a resume prompt for a fresh context window
Amend an existing Knowz vault entry with a targeted change -- just describe the delta
Help configure the Knowz MCP connection for Codex
